extraction_policy: Every event, state change, and knowledge transfer must be supported by evidence from the current narrative-unit text.
Base candidates on the current narrative unit.
Write all natural-language output values in the same language as the current narrative unit, except for exact names, codes, and schema labels.
Prioritize content that changes character knowledge, entity state, relationships, world rules, or open narrative threads.
Use prior context for naming continuity and duplicate avoidance.
The output must be parseable JSON.
